name: Sicilian Mushroom Flatbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Grease a 15x10x1-inch baking pan or large cookie sheet.
3. Heat olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
4. Add onion, sun-dried tomatoes, oregano (fresh or dried), rosemary (fresh or dried), and garlic; cook and stir for 4 minutes, or until the onion is tender.
5. Stir in sliced mushrooms. Remove from heat.
6. Unroll dough on the greased pan. Starting at the center, press with your hands to form a 12x9-inch rectangle.
7. Spread the onion mixture evenly over the dough. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 12 to 14 minutes, or until the edges of the crust are golden brown.
9. Cut into 8 or 16 rectangles. Serve 8 servings or 16 appetizers.
Nutrition Information per Serving: Calories 120, Protein 5 g, Carbohydrate 18 g, Dietary Fiber 1 g, Fat 3 g (Polyunsaturated 1 g, Saturated 1 g), Cholesterol 2 mg, Potassium 70 mg
Dietary Exchanges: 1 starch, 1 vegetable, 1/2 fat
